_comment: Example product-family mapping that works with the synthetic sample dataset (data/sample/orders_sample.csv). The committed pipeline falls back to this file when config/product_mappings.json is absent, so the repo is runnable end-to-end on the sample after cloning. To run on a real dataset, copy this file to product_mappings.json and adapt the substrings. A rule matches when ALL its conditions match; a condition matches when the chosen field (name/sku/vendor) contains ANY of the listed substrings, case-insensitive. Rules are evaluated top to bottom; the first match wins.
